Greg Pierce becomes Trofeo's COO, leading daily operations and developing cloud solutions in Tampa.
news.summary: A new Chief Operating Officer, Greg Pierce, has joined Trofeo in Tampa, Florida. With his appointment, he will oversee daily operations and drive the growth of cloud solutions for the company.

The US intelligence community assesses Russian influence actors who created online content alleging inappropriate activity by Democratic Vice Presidential Candidates Walz - Intelligence Official.
Elevai Biosciences partners with CRO for FDA planning on EL-22 obesity treatment.
news.summary: Elevai Biosciences has partnered with a top Contract Research Organization (CRO) to assist in regulatory planning for their medication, EL-22, intended for addressing obesity. The collaboration aims to prepare for a Pre-Investigational New Drug (IND) meeting with the Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This strategic move reflects Elevai Biosciences' commitment to advance their drug development program. The CRO's expertise will be invaluable in navigating the regulatory process as Elevai Biosciences aims to bring EL-22 to market as a potential solution for obesity.

news.headline: Company Foresight achieved significant growth in Q3 2024, exceeding revenue projections by 15% and profits by 20%.
Sherweb expands Veeam offerings for MSPs, boosting product portfolio in cloud marketplace.
news.summary: Sherweb, a prominent leader in the cloud marketplace, has recently expanded its product portfolio by adding Veeam offerings. This update allows Sherweb to further enhance its services, catering to a larger customer base.

news.headline: Saviynt enhances Partner Program to boost Enterprise Identity Security via Identity Cloud, aiding global partners.
news.summary: Today, Saviynt, a prominent provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, revealed the enhancements made to its Saviynt Accelerate Partner Program. Tailored to empower its global network of partners, which includes distribution, solution, service, and technology partners, this program provides a structured pathway for growth. By offering vital resources, comprehensive training, certifications, and support, Saviynt aims to equip partners with the tools they need to succeed.

news.headline: Forrester predicts a 25% decline in brand loyalty by 2025 due to rising prices, but loyalty programs will gain popularity.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Forrester's latest report on 2025 B2C marketing and customer experience forecasts a 25% decline in brand loyalty due to increasing prices. However, loyalty programs are expected to become more popular as consumers seek value and alternatives to price shopping. The predictions by Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) highlight the shifting landscape of consumer preferences and trends to monitor in the upcoming year.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: Rate-cutting should remain cautious and gradual.
Medicaid plans' administrative expenses rose in 2023 with a 5.4% growth in core per member costs. Core PMPM costs were $39.68.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that in 2023, Core per member administrative expenses in Medicaid-focused plans experienced a growth of 5.4%, a notable increase compared to the 1.8% growth seen in 2022. When adjusting for product mix changes, the real core Cost growth rate was 5.3%, significantly higher than the 2.4% growth in 2022. While holding mix constant, the growth in Account and Membership Administration was 3.9%, down from 5.7% in 2022. Core per member per month (PMPM) costs reached $39.68. These findings can be found in the Plan Management Navigator published on sherlockco.com/navi.

news.headline: Logitech's Q2 revenue up 6% to $1.116 billion, beats estimates. Gaming sales increased by 7%, adjusted gross margin expanded to 44.1%.
news.summary: Logitech International S.A. (NASDAQ:LOGI) saw a decline in shares following the release of its second-quarter FY25 earnings report. The company reported a 6% increase in revenue to $1.116 billion, surpassing the expected $1.11 billion. Sales in various categories also showed growth with Video Collaboration up by 5%, Gaming by 7%, Keyboards & Combos by 8%, and Pointing Devices by 2%. The adjusted gross margin widened to 44.1% from 42.0% compared to the previous year, while adjusted operating income rose by 5% to $193 million for the quarter. The adjusted EPS of $1.20 also exceeded expectations.

news.headline: DataVerify integrates with Calyx Software's Path LOS, a platform for mortgage lenders, with its DRIVE platform.
news.summary: In St. Louis, DataVerify, a prominent provider of data verification and risk management services, revealed a recent partnership with Calyx Software, known for its loan origination platforms. The collaboration involves integrating DataVerify's DRIVE platform with Calyx Software's cloud-based Path LOS system, tailored for mortgage lenders and financial institutions. This integration on Path includes DRIVE, offering 4506-C tax transcript verification services. This development aims to enhance efficiency and accuracy in loan processing for users of Path LOS.

news.headline: Warning from Knot about economies facing collapse if financial regulation weakens; source.
IMF's Gourinchas: IMF projections assume two more Fed rate cuts in 2024, additional cuts in 2025.
Spirit Halloween leads pop-up trend, transforming closed stores to profitable locations. Presence grows in 2024. Data analyzed by dataplor.
news.summary: In Manhattan Beach, California, Spirit Halloween is making a notable impact as a seasonal pop-up retailer in 2024. As major traditional retail stores close down, Spirit Halloween is taking advantage of this trend by occupying vacant spaces and turning them into profitable locations. This strategy reflects a larger shift in the retail real estate sector. According to dataplor, a top global location intelligence provider, the presence of Spirit Halloween has expanded significantly this year. The company's analysis reveals the success of Spirit Halloween's location strategy amid the changing retail landscape.

news.headline: Spain's Data Center Colocation Market valued at USD 430M in 2023, projected to reach USD 690M by 2029, with a CAGR of 8.20%.
news.summary: A report on the Spain Data Center Colocation Market has been released, detailing its Supply & Demand Analysis for the period 2024-2029. The market was valued at USD 430 million in 2023, with a projected increase to USD 690 million by 2029, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.20%. The report delves into retail and wholesale colocation pricing analysis, highlighting trends, opportunities, growth constraints, and future prospects within Spain's data center colocation industry.

news.headline: StructuredWeb announced AssistantAI on ChannelGPT, offering advanced AI for vendor-partner collaboration.
news.summary: In New York, StructuredWeb revealed the introduction of AssistantAI, an innovative feature of its ChannelGPT AI platform. AssistantAI aims to streamline collaboration between vendors and partners by utilizing generative AI technology. This launch marks an advancement in the TCMA realm, as StructuredWeb is recognized for its enterprise-level offerings. The feature is designed to enhance global vendor and partner interactions. This new feature emphasizes the company's commitment to cutting-edge solutions and shows its dedication to optimizing through-channel marketing automation.

news.headline: Holiday shoppers worry about store safety, with 78% fearing for safety this year. 26% plan to shop more in-person.
news.summary: In Dallas, the 2024 holiday shopping season is underway with high expectations from consumers. A recent survey by Theatro reveals that 26% of shoppers intend to do more in-person holiday shopping this year. However, worries about safety are prevalent, as 78% express concerns about their well-being while shopping during the holidays. Additionally, 34% of respondents are considering waiting until the last minute to make their purchases due to budget limitations, technological frustrations, and safety anxieties.

news.headline: Paccurate secures $8.1M Series A funding led by High Alpha, aiming to revolutionize packing for retailers.
news.summary: In New York, Paccurate, a packing intelligence platform for parcel shippers, has finalized an $8.1 million Series A funding round. High Alpha spearheaded the investment, joined by Tech Square Ventures, Grand Ventures, HPA (Hyde Park Angels), Las Olas Venture Capital, Springtime Ventures, and Royal Street Ventures. The increasing prominence of e-commerce is driving the need for companies to cut down on shipping expenses and meet environmental, social, and governance (ESG) objectives.

news.headline: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. reported $6.3 million net income for the first quarter, with $2.9 billion in assets.
news.summary: Catskill, New York on Oct. 22, 2024 - Greene County Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: GCBC), the parent company of The Bank of Greene County and Greene County Commercial Bank, announced its financial results for the first quarter of the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025. The company reported a net income of $6.3 million, or $0.37 per basic and diluted share, for the three months ending September 30, 2024. This is a decrease from the net income of $6.5 million, or $0.38 per basic and diluted share, for the same period in 2023 - a decline of $208,000 or 3.2%.

news.headline: US Intelligence Official: Russia, Iran and China remain intent on fanning divisive narratives to divide Americans as election approaches.
Xi meets Putin in Kazan, Russia - Xinhua.
HSBC, Europe's largest lender, undergoes restructuring to lower costs. First female CFO appointed.
news.summary: Europe's largest bank is undergoing a restructuring to reduce expenses and manage challenges within its extensive operations. The bank is aiming to navigate through complex diplomatic issues while focusing on cost-cutting measures.

news.headline: Philip Morris reports strong Q3 performance with revenue of $9.91 billion, up 8.4% year over year, beating consensus. CEO praises record quarterly net revenues and EPS.
news.summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) saw an increase in stock trading on Tuesday following the release of their third-quarter 2024 earnings report. The company reported revenue of $9.91 billion for the quarter, indicating an 8.4% increase compared to the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $9.69 billion. Net revenues experienced an 11.6% organic growth, primarily driven by higher combustible tobacco pricing and increased volume of smoke-free products. CEO Jacek Olczak expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, noting record quarterly net revenues and earnings per share. The growth was attributed to strong sales momentum globally, particularly with notable growth in IQOS adjusted in-market sales and ZYN products.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: I see risks of undershooting target inflation.
BoE Gov. Bailey: We should never have been complacent about financial stability risks.
IMF's Gourinchas: The risks of a US recession are somewhat diminished.
IMF's Gourinchas: The US is benefiting from strong productivity growth and immigration boost to labor force.
Crane 1 acquires Bridge Crane Specialists and Bridge Crane Express in Tulsa, Oklahoma. Established in 1987, Bridge Crane offers custom overhead crane solutions across three locations.
news.summary: Crane 1 Services Inc., based in Cincinnati, announced its acquisition of Bridge Crane Specialists, LLC and Bridge Crane Express, LLC on October 16, 2024. The acquisition includes three locations in the greater Tulsa, Oklahoma area. Bridge Crane, established in 1987, is known for its custom overhead crane systems and related services. The company has become a reputable player in the industry, offering quality manufacturing and servicing of overhead cranes and material handling equipment.

news.headline: 52% of shoppers are interested in purchasing items from international sellers, presenting growth opportunities for ecommerce companies.
news.summary: nShift, a global leader in delivery and experience management, highlights the potential for growth in international sales this Black Friday. A recent report by nShift reveals that 52% of consumers actively seek products from overseas markets. This data is crucial as 64% of shoppers are anticipated to participate in online shopping on November 29. The report underscores the importance of overcoming challenges associated with global shipping for ecommerce companies looking to capitalize on this trend.

news.headline: Actresses Diane Franklin and Kimberley Kates reunite for 'Avenger Field' on Amazon Audible in new project.
Dow Jones fell as Treasury yields rose; Nvidia at risk of sliding from record highs.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones fell due to the ongoing rise in Treasury yields. Additionally, Nvidia stock, which had reached record highs, was at risk of sliding. This indicates a significant downturn in the market, with investors closely monitoring the situation. The impact of these fluctuations is evident in the unstable nature of the stock market, with key players such as Nvidia being directly affected. It is crucial for stakeholders to remain vigilant and adapt their strategies accordingly amidst this uncertain market environment.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: If data suggests faster trajectory, the ECB will consider.

 transaction date: 2024-09-30 
 filed at date: 2024-10-21
Kimberly-Clark's third quarter earnings per share beat expectations at $1.83, but revenues fell short at $4.952 billion. Stock price declined due to retail inventory pressures.
news.summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NYSE:KMB) saw a decrease in its stock price on Tuesday following its third quarter financial report. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $1.83, surpassing expectations of $1.70. However, quarterly revenues of $4.952 billion fell short of the anticipated $5.048 billion. Sales for the quarter declined by 4%, but organic sales experienced a 1% growth compared to the previous year. Kimberly-Clark's adjusted gross margin for the quarter reached 36.7%, an increase of 90 basis points from the prior year, driven by significant productivity improvements. While Developed Markets like Australia, South Korea, and Western/Central Europe showed positive volume and mix trends, North America experienced a decline. Volumes in Developing and Emerging markets remained consistent with the previous year.

news.headline: Pentair beats Q3 estimates with $993M net sales, $239M adjusted operating income, and a 39.6% gross margin.
news.summary: Pentair plc's (NYSE:PNR) third-quarter 2024 net sales reached $993 million, showing a 2% decrease from the previous year but surpassing the estimated $988.8 million. Core sales, excluding external factors, dropped by 1% during this period. The gross margin saw a significant increase from 36.9% to 39.6% year-over-year, while adjusted operating income rose by 13% to $239 million, with the margin expanding by 310 basis points to 24.1%.Flow sales declined by 7% to $372.2 million, with segment income rising by 7% to $82.8 million and the operating margin reaching 22.2%, marking a 280 basis points increase year-over-year. Water Solutions sales dipped by 3% to $289.5 million, with segment income falling by 6% to $64.4 million and ROS decreasing to 22.2%, down by 80 basis points.Pool segment sales amounted to $331.4 million. These figures reflect Pentair's performance in the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: The data will tell us if we have to do 25 bps or 50 bps.
ECB's Centeno: Rates will converge rather quickly at the neutral rate.
Taiwan Data Center Colocation Market valued at USD 134M in 2023, expected to hit USD 235M by 2029 with CAGR of 9.81%. Standout providers: Chunghwa Telecom, Chief Telecom.
news.summary: A report analyzing the Taiwan Data Center Colocation Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2023, the market was valued at USD 134 million and is projected to reach USD 235 million by 2029, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.81%. The report delves into retail and wholesale colocation pricing, highlighting trends, opportunities, growth barriers, and future prospects within the Taiwan data center colocation sector.

news.headline: Kinetic Business launches fiber & voice services for SMBs, schools, and libraries in Little Rock, providing enterprise-grade internet & communication solutions at affordable rates.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, Kinetic Business, a prominent fiber internet provider under the Windstream brand, unveiled a fresh selection of internet, phone, and collaboration solution packages designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). These bundles cater to the requirements of SMBs seeking enterprise-grade internet and unified communications services that are simplified and cost-effective. The offerings provide SMBs with advanced digital communication features previously reserved for larger enterprises, enabling them to enhance their connectivity.

news.headline: IMF's Gourinchas: China stimulus measures announced by PBOC are not sufficient to lift growth in a substantially material way.
Peloton partners with Costco to sell Bike+ at 300 US stores and online, exclusive bundle available until 2025.
news.summary: In New York, Peloton Interactive, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTON) and Costco (NASDAQ: COST) revealed a collaboration where Costco plans to offer the Peloton Bike+ at 300 US locations and online at Costco.com for this holiday period. From November 1, exclusive Bike+ bundles will be available to Costco members until February 15, 2025, or until stocks run out. This marks Peloton's debut seasonal retail venture in the US, aligning with a company focused on providing a unique fitness experience.
